## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? -->

## How tested

<!--
Note the automated and manual testing you did. Per CONTRIBUTING, changes to
hotkey, panel, pasteboard, or Accessibility behavior are hard to unit-test, so
describe the manual verification (target app used, macOS version, what you
observed).
-->

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for prompt/provider logic (if applicable)
- [ ] Documented manual testing for hotkey / panel / pasteboard / Accessibility changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Updated docs (README / ARCHITECTURE / SPEC) if behavior changed
